title: Ukrainian Chicken Stir Fry
description: A delicious and flavorful stir fry recipe from Ukraine, featuring chicken and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken to the skillet and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil to the skillet.
Add the diced onion to the skillet and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced bell pepper and grated carrots to the skillet and cook until tender, about 4-5 minutes.
Add the diced potato to the skillet and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the flour and chicken broth until smooth.
Add the flour mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the cooked chicken to the skillet and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened.
Stir in the sour cream and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until heated through.
Serve the Ukrainian Chicken Stir Fry hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
